title: 7 packs (38 pcs) Mini Highlighter Pens, Pastel Colourful Highlighter Cute Stackable Kawaii Marker Pens for Writing Drawing Office School Supplies Stationery
features: WHAT YOU WILL GET - Get ready to be charmed by our set of 7 adorable highlighters featuring 7 different shapes - octopus, heart, flower, paw, ice cream, block, and cylinder. Each unique shape comes in 5-6 different colors, totaling a whopping 38 pieces!

RELIABLE MATERIAL - Made from high-quality plastic, our watercolor highlighters are sturdy, durable, and long-lasting. You can use them to your heart’s content without worrying about breakage or fading.

CUTE DESIGN - Our highlighters are not just functional, they’re also super cute and fun! The different shapes and colors add a touch of whimsy to your daily routine, making highlighting and note-taking more enjoyable.

WIDE RANGE OF USE - These mild soft pastel highlighters are perfect for use in school, home, office, and even on-the-go! Use them for color coding, highlighting textbooks, journals, planners, work schedules, studying, and note-taking.
CONSIDERATE PRESENTS - Our highlighter set makes for a thoughtful and practical gift for friends and family. They’ll love using them for schoolwork and creative projects.
description: Product Description PACKING LIST 7 x Highlighter Pens DETAILS Ingredient: Plastic, Ink Style: octopus, heart, flower, paw, ice cream, block, and cylinder Size: 6.7-8.3in / 17-21cm PLEASE NOTE These pens are not suitable for children under 14 years old.
